<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Er. Murtuza Dudhiyawala — Structural Engineer</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&family=Outfit:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
:root{
  --bg:#FAFAF8;--white:#FFFFFF;--card:#F4F3F0;--border:#E5E2DC;
  --yellow:#F5C518;--yellow-dk:#C49A0A;--yellow-bg:#FFFBEB;
  --black:#0A0A0A;--text:#111111;--mid:#444444;--muted:#777777;--r:12px;
}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:600;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.97);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-bottom:2px solid var(--border);height:60px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 16px;}
.nav-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.nav-pill{background:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);font-size:10px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:100px;white-space:nowrap;}
.nav-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--black);}
.nav-links{display:none;}
.nav-cta{background:var(--black);color:var(--yellow);padding:9px 18px;border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;}
.nav-cta:hover{background:#333;}

/* HERO */
.hero{background:var(--black);display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding-top:60px;}
.hero-left{padding:40px 20px 32px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.hero-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(245,197,24,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(245,197,24,0.3);padding:7px 14px;border-radius:100px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--yellow);margin-bottom:24px;width:fit-content;}
.badge-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#4ADE80;animation:glow 2s infinite;}
@keyframes glow{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(74,222,128,.5);}60%{box-shadow:0 0 0 5px transparent;}}
.hero h1{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:clamp(40px,10vw,88px);font-weight:400;line-height:1.0;color:#fff;margin-bottom:6px;}
.hero h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--yellow);}
.hero-role{font-size:15px;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin:16px 0 20px;}
.hero-role strong{color:var(--yellow);font-weight:600;}
.hero-desc{font-size:14px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.55);max-width:500px;margin-bottom:32px;font-weight:300;}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn-yellow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);padding:12px 24px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;transition:all .25s;border:none;cursor:pointer;}
.btn-yellow:hover{background:#FFD740;}
.btn-outline-w{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);color:#fff;padding:12px 24px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;}
.btn-outline-w:hover{border-color:var(--yellow);color:var(--yellow);}

/* HERO IMAGE SHOWCASE */
.hero-showcase{width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;}
.showcase-main{width:100%;height:240px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;}
.showcase-main img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(0.8);}
.showcase-main-label{position:absolute;bottom:14px;left:14px;background:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);font-size:10px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 12px;border-radius:100px;}
.showcase-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:2px;height:110px;}
.showcase-thumb{overflow:hidden;position:relative;}
.showcase-thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(0.75);transition:filter .3s;}
.showcase-thumb:hover img{filter:brightness(1);}
.showcase-thumb-label{position:absolute;bottom:8px;left:8px;background:rgba(10,10,10,0.75);color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;}

/* STATS */
.hero-stats{display:flex;background:rgba(10,10,10,0.95);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);}
.hs-item{flex:1;padding:14px 8px;text-align:center;border-right:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);}
.hs-item:last-child{border-right:none;}
.hs-num{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--yellow);line-height:1;}
.hs-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);margin-top:3px;}

/* SECTIONS */
.sec{padding:60px 20px;}
.sec.alt{background:var(--white);}
.sec.dark{background:var(--black);color:#fff;}
.tag{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--yellow-dk);margin-bottom:12px;}
.tag::before{content:'';width:20px;height:2px;background:var(--yellow);border-radius:2px;}
.dark .tag{color:var(--yellow);}
h2.sh{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:clamp(30px,8vw,58px);font-weight:400;line-height:1.08;color:var(--black);margin-bottom:14px;}
h2.sh em{font-style:italic;color:var(--yellow-dk);}
.dark h2.sh{color:#fff;}
.dark h2.sh em{color:var(--yellow);}
.sec-rule{width:40px;height:3px;background:var(--yellow);border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:36px;}

/* ABOUT */
.about-body p{font-size:14px;line-height:1.9;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:16px;}
.about-chips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:24px;}
.chip{padding:7px 14px;border-radius:100px;background:var(--yellow-bg);border:1px solid #EDD87A;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#7A5C00;cursor:default;transition:all .2s;}
.chip:hover{background:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);border-color:var(--yellow);}
.about-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;margin-top:28px;}
.about-card{background:var(--bg);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:18px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;transition:all .25s;}
.about-card:hover{border-color:var(--yellow);background:var(--yellow-bg);}
.ac-icon{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--yellow);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;flex-shrink:0;}
.ac-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--black);margin-bottom:2px;}
.ac-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);}

/* SOFTWARE GRID - visual cards */
.sw-grid{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.sw-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:18px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;transition:all .3s;}
.sw-card:hover{background:var(--white);border-color:var(--yellow);transform:translateX(4px);}
.sw-ico{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--yellow);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0;}
.sw-info{flex:1;}
.sw-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--black);}
.sw-use{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}
.sw-badge{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:100px;background:var(--yellow-bg);font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--yellow-dk);white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;}

/* SERVICES */
.tab-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:3px;}
.stab{padding:12px 18px;border-radius:9px;border:2px solid var(--border);background:var(--white);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--mid);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-align:left;}
.stab:hover{border-color:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);}
.stab.on{background:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);border-color:var(--yellow);}
.tpanel{display:none;animation:fadeUp .3s ease both;background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden;}
.tpanel.on{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
.tp-col{padding:24px 20px;}
.tp-col:first-child{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.tp-heading{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--yellow-dk);margin-bottom:16px;}
.tp-items{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;}
.ti{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:11px 14px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);transition:all .2s;}
.ti:hover{background:var(--yellow-bg);border-color:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);}
.ti-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--yellow);flex-shrink:0;}

/* PROJECTS */
.proj-grid{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;}
.pcard{border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden;position:relative;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--black);transition:all .3s;}
.pcard:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);border-color:var(--yellow);}
.pcard img{width:100%;height:210px;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .5s,filter .3s;filter:brightness(0.85);}
.pcard:hover img{transform:scale(1.04);filter:brightness(0.5);}
.pcard-info{padding:16px 18px;background:var(--white);border-top:3px solid var(--yellow);}
.pcard-cat{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--yellow-dk);margin-bottom:4px;}
.pcard-name{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--black);margin-bottom:3px;}
.pcard-hint{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);}
.pcard-arrow{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;opacity:0;transform:scale(0.7);transition:all .25s;}
.pcard:hover .pcard-arrow{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}

/* MODAL - slides up from bottom on mobile */
.modal{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:900;background:rgba(10,10,10,0.8);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:none;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:center;}
.modal.open{display:flex;}
.mbox{background:var(--white);border-radius:20px 20px 0 0;width:100%;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 -20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);animation:slideUp .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.2,.64,1) both;}
@keyframes slideUp{from{transform:translateY(100%);}to{transform:translateY(0);}}
.mbox-img{width:100%;height:200px;object-fit:cover;display:block;}
.mbox-body{padding:24px 20px 36px;position:relative;}
.mclose{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;color:var(--muted);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.mclose:hover{background:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);}
.m-cat{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--yellow-dk);margin-bottom:8px;}
.m-title{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:24px;line-height:1.1;color:var(--black);margin-bottom:12px;}
.m-sep{width:36px;height:3px;background:var(--yellow);border-radius:2px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.m-desc{font-size:14px;line-height:1.8;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:16px;}
.m-scope{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:7px;margin-bottom:24px;}
.m-tag{padding:5px 12px;border-radius:100px;background:var(--yellow-bg);border:1px solid #EDD87A;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#7A5C00;}

/* WHY */
.why-cards{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;}
.wcard{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:var(--r);padding:24px 20px;transition:all .3s;}
.wcard:hover{border-color:var(--yellow);background:rgba(245,197,24,0.06);}
.wcard-icon{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--yellow);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:20px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.wcard-title{font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:8px;}
.wcard-desc{font-size:14px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.65);font-weight:300;}
.why-cta{background:var(--yellow);border-radius:var(--r);padding:32px 24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;margin-top:14px;}
.why-cta h3{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:clamp(22px,6vw,36px);color:var(--black);line-height:1.2;}
.btn-black{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--black);color:var(--yellow);padding:13px 28px;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;width:fit-content;}
.btn-black:hover{background:#222;}

/* COLLAB */
.collab-box{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:28px 20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:24px;}
.collab-box h3{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:26px;color:var(--black);margin-bottom:10px;}
.collab-box h3 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--yellow-dk);}
.collab-box p{font-size:14px;color:var(--mid);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:18px;}
.ctags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;}
.ctag{padding:9px 16px;border-radius:100px;background:var(--white);border:2px solid var(--border);font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--mid);transition:all .2s;}
.ctag:hover{border-color:var(--yellow);color:var(--black);background:var(--yellow-bg);}
.logos-label{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px;}
.logos-wrap img{width:100%;border-radius:10px;}

/* CONTACT */
.contact-yellow{background:var(--yellow);border-radius:16px;padding:36px 24px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.contact-yellow h3{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:clamp(24px,7vw,40px);color:var(--black);line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:12px;}
.contact-yellow p{font-size:14px;color:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:28px;}
.cdetails{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}
.cd{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;}
.cd-ico{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.12);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:16px;flex-shrink:0;}
.cd-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(0,0,0,0.45);margin-bottom:2px;}
.cd-val{font-size:14px;color:var(--black);font-weight:600;}
.cd-val a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}
.contact-form{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:32px 24px;}
.contact-form h3{font-family:'DM Serif Display',serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--black);margin-bottom:4px;}
.contact-form .sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:24px;}
.fg{margin-bottom:14px;}
.fg label{display:block;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--mid);margin-bottom:5px;}
.fg input,.fg textarea,.fg select{width:100%;background:var(--bg);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;color:var(--text);padding:12px 14px;font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-size:14px;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s;resize:none;-webkit-appearance:none;}
.fg input:focus,.fg textarea:focus,.fg select:focus{border-color:var(--yellow);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(245,197,24,0.15);}
.fg select option{background:#fff;color:#111;}
.sub-btn{width:100%;padding:14px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--black);border:none;font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--yellow);cursor:pointer;transition:all .25s;margin-top:4px;}
.sub-btn:hover{background:#222;}

/* FOOTER */
footer{background:var(--black);padding:24px 20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:12px;text-align:center;}
.ft-name{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;}
.ft-name span{color:var(--yellow);}
.ft-copy{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.3);}
.ft-links{display:flex;gap:20px;justify-content:center;}
.ft-links a{font-size:12px;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.45);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;}
.ft-links a:hover{color:var(--yellow);}

/* DESKTOP */
@media(min-width:768px){
  nav{padding:0 52px;height:66px;}
  .nav-pill{font-size:11px;padding:5px 14px;}
  .nav-name{font-size:16px;}
  .nav-links{display:flex;gap:4px;list-style:none;}
  .nav-links a{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--mid);text-decoration:none;padding:7px 14px;border-radius:8px;transition:all .2s;}
  .nav-links a:hover{color:var(--black);background:#F0EFE9;}
  .nav-cta{padding:10px 26px;font-size:13px;}
  .hero{flex-direction:row;min-height:100vh;padding-top:66px;}
  .hero-left{flex:1;padding:80px 52px;justify-content:center;}
  .hero h1{font-size:clamp(52px,6.5vw,88px);}
  .hero-role{font-size:18px;margin:24px 0 40px;}
  .hero-desc{font-size:15px;margin-bottom:48px;}
  .btn-yellow,.btn-outline-w{padding:14px 32px;font-size:14px;}
  .hero-showcase{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
  .showcase-main{flex:1;height:auto;min-height:300px;}
  .showcase-row{height:160px;}
  .hero-stats{display:flex;}
  .sec{padding:100px 52px;}
  .tab-row{flex-direction:row;}
  .tpanel.on{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .tp-col:first-child{border-bottom:none;border-right:1px solid var(--border);}
  .about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:start;}
  .sw-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:14px;}
  .sw-card{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;padding:24px 20px;}
  .proj-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:16px;}
  .pcard img{height:220px;}
  .why-cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px;}
  .why-cta{flex-direction:row;align-items:center;padding:48px 52px;margin-top:0;}
  .collab-box{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:52px;padding:48px 52px;align-items:center;}
  .contact-wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.2fr;gap:24px;}
  .contact-yellow{margin-bottom:0;}
  .modal{align-items:center;padding:24px;}
  .mbox{border-radius:20px;max-width:640px;width:100%;max-height:none;}
  @keyframes slideUp{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.95) translateY(20px);}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) translateY(0);}}
  footer{flex-direction:row;padding:28px 52px;text-align:left;}
  .ft-links{justify-content:flex-end;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <div class="nav-left">
    <div class="nav-pill">B.E. Civil</div>
    <div class="nav-name">Er. Murtuza Dudhiyawala</div>
  </div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#software">Skills</a></li>
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#projects">Projects</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="tel:+919328802561" class="nav-cta">Hire Me &#8594;</a>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero" id="home">
  <div class="hero-left">
    <div class="hero-badge"><span class="badge-dot"></span>Available for Projects</div>
    <h1>Structure<br><em>Design</em><br>Engineer</h1>
    <p class="hero-role">Specializing in <strong>Steel &amp; RCC</strong> Structure Design</p>
    <p class="hero-desc">Tailored design solutions built on accuracy, innovation, and on-time delivery — across industrial, residential, and commercial projects.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#projects" class="btn-yellow">View Projects &#8594;</a>
      <a href="#contact" class="btn-outline-w">Get In Touch</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-showcase">
    <div class="showcase-main">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Bungalow Design">
      <div class="showcase-main-label">Bungalow Design</div>
    </div>
    <div class="showcase-row">
      <div class="showcase-thumb">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Cantilever Gantry">
        <div class="showcase-thumb-label">Cantilever Gantry</div>
      </div>
      <div class="showcase-thumb">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64,
